goal: Ensure sensitive file operations require fresh per-operation approval and cannot be bypassed by session-wide always approval or permission allow-list policy.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Credential, key, secret, token, or env-file writes inherit ordinary file approval behavior, allowing auto-approve or allow-list settings to mutate sensitive material without a fresh human decision.
